message.content:
Explore the survey-king project at D:\project\pt-gitlab\survey-king thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. Project structure - what's in server/, client/, website/ directories
2. Server: check build.gradle or pom.xml for dependencies (especially DB, Redis, etc.), check application.yml for ports and config
3. Frontend: check if there's any frontend code in client/ or elsewhere, check package.json
4. Check deploy/ directory for any additional config files (nginx conf, etc.)
5. Check if there's a .env.example or similar
6. What database does it use (MySQL, H2, etc.)
7. What port does it run on
8. Check server/settings.gradle for modules

Be thorough - check server/api/src/main/resources/ for application*.yml files, check server/build.gradle and server/settings.gradle.

content.text: I'll explore the survey-king project thoroughly. Let me run multiple searches in parallel to gather all the information efficiently.

data.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'git commit/push is globally prohibited.'})) if re.match(r'^git\s+(commit|push)', cmd, re.IGNORECASE) else None"

content.content:
1→version: 1.10.0
     2→spring:
     3→  application:
     4→    name: survey
     5→  profiles:
     6→    active: @activeProfile@ # maven 配置
     7→#    active: ${activeProfile} # gradle 配置
     8→  mvc:
     9→    async:
    10→      request-timeout: -1
    11→    static-path-pattern: /notfound # 覆盖默认的 /**
    12→    throw-exception-if-no-handler-found: true
    13→    pathmatch:
    14→      matching-strategy: ant_path_matcher
    15→  servlet:
    16→    multipart:
    17→      max-file-size: 2048MB
    18→      max-request-size: 2048MB
    19→  jackson:
    20→    default-property-inclusion: non_null # 序列化忽略空值
    21→    date-format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
    22→    time-zone: GMT+8
    23→    serialization:
    24→      FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS: false
    25→    deserialization:
    26→      FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES: false # 反序列化时允许未知属性
    27→sk:
    28→  security:
    29→    url-token-authentication:
    30→      enabled: true # 默认开启 url token 认证
    31→flowable:
    32→  async-executor-activate: false
    33→  database-schema-update: false
    34→
    35→aj:
    36→  captcha:
    37→    jigsaw: classpath:images/jigsaw # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    38→    pic-click: classpath:images/pic-click # 滑动验证，底图路径，不配置将使用默认图片；以 classpath: 开头，取 resource 目录下路径
    39→    cache-type: local # 缓存 local/redis...
    40→    cache-number: 1000 # local 缓存的阈值,达到这个值，清除缓存
    41→    timing-clear: 180 # local定时清除过期缓存(单位秒),设置为0代表不执行
    42→    type: blockPuzzle # 验证码类型 default两种都实例化。 blockPuzzle 滑块拼图 clickWord 文字点选
    43→    water-mark: survey # 右下角水印文字(我的水印)，可使用 https://tool.chinaz.com/tools/unicode.aspx 中文转 Unicode，Linux 可能需要转 unicode
    44→    interference-options: 2 # 滑动干扰项(0/1/2)
    45→    req-frequency-limit-enable: false # 接口请求次数一分钟限制是否开启 true|false
    46→    req-get-lock-limit: 5 # 验证失败5次，get接口锁定
    47→    req-get-lock-seconds: 10 # 验证失败后，锁定时间间隔
    48→    req-get-minute-limit: 30 # get 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    49→    req-check-minute-limit: 60 # check 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    50→    req-verify-minute-limit: 60 # verify 接口一分钟内请求数限制
    51→
    52→api:
    53→  prefix: /api
    54→
    55→surveyking:
    56→  ai:
    57→    siliconflow:
    58→      enabled: true
    59→      base-url: https://api.siliconflow.cn
    60→      token: ${AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN:your_token}
    61→      model-id: deepseek-chat
    62→      model-types:
    63→        - display-name: "DeepSeek Chat"
    64→          value: "deepseek-chat"
    65→          description: "DeepSeek 对话模型"
    66→        - display-name: "Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
    67→          value: "Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct"
    68→          description: "Qwen2.5 72B 指令模型"
    69→        - display-name: "Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
    70→          value: "meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct"
    71→          description: "Llama 3.1 70B 指令模型"

content.content:
1→server:
     2→  port: 7007
     3→  servlet:
     4→    session:
     5→      timeout: 1h
     6→  compression:
     7→    enabled: true
     8→    min-response-size: 1024
     9→file-storage:
    10→  local:
    11→    root-path: ./files
    12→    # set the file path
    13→    pathStrategy: byId
    14→    dateFormat: yyyyMM/dd
    15→    nameStrategy: seqAndOriginalName
    16→custom-cache:
    17→  entries:
    18→    projectCache: 1d
    19→    fileCache: 1h
    20→    userCache: 1h
    21→    deptCache: 1d
    22→    projectPermissionCache: 1d
    23→    commonCache: 30d

1→<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
     2→<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
     3→    xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
     4→    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
     5→    <packaging>pom</packaging>
     6→    <modules>
     7→        <module>api</module>
     8→        <module>shared</module>
     9→        <module>rdbms</module>
    10→        <module>ai</module>
    11→        <!--        <module>flow</module>-->
    12→    </modules>
    13→    <parent>
    14→        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    15→        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
    16→        <version>2.7.7</version>
    17→        <relativePath/>
    18→        <!-- lookup parent from repository -->
    19→    </parent>
    20→    <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
    21→    <artifactId>survey-server</artifactId>
    22→    <version>${revision}</version>
    23→    <name>survey-server</name>
    24→    <description>Make a better open source survey system.</description>
    25→
    26→    <properties>
    27→        <java.version>1.8</java.version>
    28→        <revision>v1.9.0</revision>
    29→        <org.mapstruct.version>1.4.2.Final</org.mapstruct.version>
    30→        <org.projectlombok.version>1.18.16</org.projectlombok.version>
    31→    </properties>
    32→
    33→    <dependencyManagement>
    34→        <dependencies>
    35→            <dependency>
    36→                <groupId>org.apache.commons</groupId>
    37→                <artifactId>commons-lang3</artifactId>
    38→                <version>3.0</version>
    39→            </dependency>
    40→            <!--滑动验证码-->
    41→            <dependency>
    42→                <groupId>com.anji-plus</groupId>
    43→                <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-captcha</artifactId>
    44→                <version>1.3.0</version>
    45→            </dependency>
    46→            <dependency>
    47→                <groupId>org.dhatim</groupId>
    48→                <artifactId>fastexcel</artifactId>
    49→                <version>0.12.13</version>
    50→            </dependency>
    51→            <dependency>
    52→                <groupId>org.dhatim</groupId>
    53→                <artifactId>fastexcel-reader</artifactId>
    54→                <version>0.12.3</version>
    55→            </dependency>
    56→            <dependency>
    57→                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
    58→                <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
    59→                <version>0.11.2</version>
    60→            </dependency>
    61→            <dependency>
    62→                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
    63→                <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
    64→                <version>0.11.2</version>
    65→            </dependency>
    66→            <dependency>
    67→                <groupId>net.coobird</groupId>
    68→                <artifactId>thumbnailator</artifactId>
    69→                <version>0.4.14</version>
    70→            </dependency>
    71→            <dependency>
    72→                <groupId>com.github.ben-manes.caffeine</groupId>
    73→                <artifactId>caffeine</artifactId>
    74→                <version>2.9.2</version>
    75→            </dependency>
    76→            <dependency>
    77→                <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
    78→                <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
    79→                <version>0.11.2</version>
    80→            </dependency>
    81→
    82→            <dependency>
    83→                <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
    84→                <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
    85→                <version>1.16.18</version>
    86→                <scope>provided</scope>
    87→            </dependency>
    88→
    89→            <dependency>
    90→                <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
    91→                <artifactId>mybatis-plus-boot-starter</artifactId>
    92→                <version>3.5.0</version>
    93→            </dependency>
    94→
    95→            <dependency>
    96→                <groupId>com.google.zxing</groupId>
    97→                <artifactId>javase</artifactId>
    98→                <version>3.5.0</version>
    99→            </dependency>
   100→
   101→            <dependency>
   102→                <groupId>com.belerweb</groupId>
   103→                <artifactId>pinyin4j</artifactId>
   104→                <version>2.5.0</version>
   105→            </dependency>
   106→
   107→            <dependency>
   108→                <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
   109→                <artifactId>mapstruct</artifactId>
   110→                <version>${org.mapstruct.version}</version>
   111→            </dependency>
   112→        </dependencies>
   113→    </dependencyManagement>
   114→
   115→    <build>
   116→        <plugins>
   117→            <plugin>
   118→                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
   119→                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
   120→                <version>3.8.1</version>
   121→                <configuration>
   122→                    <source>1.8</source>
   123→                    <target>1.8</target>
   124→                    <annotationProcessorPaths>
   125→                        <path>
   126→                            <groupId>org.mapstruct</groupId>
   127→                            <artifactId>mapstruct-processor</artifactId>
   128→                            <version>${org.mapstruct.version}</version>
   129→                        </path>
   130→                        <path>
   131→                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
   132→                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
   133→                            <version>${org.projectlombok.version}</version>
   134→                        </path>
   135→
   136→                        <!-- additional annotation processor required as of Lombok 1.18.16 -->
   137→                        <path>
   138→                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
   139→                            <artifactId>lombok-mapstruct-binding</artifactId>
   140→                            <version>0.2.0</version>
   141→                        </path>
   142→                    </annotationProcessorPaths>
   143→
   144→                    <compilerArgs>
   145→                        <arg> -Amapstruct.suppressGeneratorTimestamp=true
   146→                        </arg>
   147→                        <arg> -Amapstruct.suppressGeneratorVersionInfoComment=true
   148→                        </arg>
   149→                        <arg> -Amapstruct.verbose=true
   150→                        </arg>
   151→                        <arg> -Amapstruct.defaultComponentModel=spring
   152→                        </arg>
   153→                        <arg> -Amapstruct.unmappedTargetPolicy=IGNORE
   154→                        </arg>
   155→                    </compilerArgs>
   156→                </configuration>
   157→            </plugin>
   158→        </plugins>
   159→    </build>
   160→</project>
   161→

1→spring:
     2→  h2:
     3→    console:
     4→      enabled: true
     5→  datasource:
     6→    #    username: sa
     7→    #    password: sa
     8→    #    url: jdbc:h2:./survey; #INIT=runscript from 'classpath:scripts/init-h2.sql'
     9→    #    driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver
    10→    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
    11→  sql:
    12→    init:
    13→      continue-on-error: true
    14→mybatis-plus:
    15→  configuration:
    16→    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl
    17→    call-setters-on-nulls: false
    18→  global-config:
    19→    db-config:
    20→      logic-delete-field: deleted

content.content:
1→# 配置文件不能放在根目录下面，否则会被 api 的 application-dev.yml 覆盖
     2→spring:
     3→  h2:
     4→    enabled:
     5→      true console:
     6→  datasource:
     7→#    username: sa
     8→#    password: sa
     9→#    url: jdbc:h2:tcp://localhost/~/survey
    10→#    driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver
    11→    username: root
    12→    password: 123456
    13→    url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/surveyking?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=UTF-8
    14→    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
    15→mybatis-plus:
    16→  configuration:
    17→    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl
    18→    call-setters-on-nulls: false
    19→  global-config:
    20→    db-config:
    21→      logic-delete-field: deleted

content.content:
1→# --- node编译镜像
     2→FROM node:24-alpine AS builder
     3→RUN apk add --no-cache git
     4→RUN mkdir -p /app
     5→WORKDIR /app
     6→
     7→COPY . .
     8→
     9→RUN npm install
    10→RUN npm run build
    11→
    12→# EXPOSE 4173
    13→# CMD ["npm", "run", "preview-web"]
    14→
    15→# --- nginx静态服务镜像
    16→FROM nginx:1.27-alpine AS runner
    17→
    18→# nginx 配置
    19→COPY ./deploy/project.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/
    20→
    21→# 项目文件
    22→COPY --from=builder /app/dist/ /var/www/project/
    23→

data.command: callback

content.content:
1→FROM amazoncorretto:21 AS builder
     2→
     3→WORKDIR /home/app
     4→
     5→COPY . /home/app
     6→RUN chmod +x ./gradlew
     7→RUN ./gradlew build -x test
     8→
     9→FROM amazoncorretto:21
    10→
    11→ARG SEMVER_FULL
    12→ENV SEMVER_FULL=${SEMVER_FULL}
    13→
    14→WORKDIR /app
    15→
    16→COPY --from=builder /home/app/build/libs/application.jar /app/app.jar
    17→
    18→EXPOSE 8081
    19→RUN mkdir -p /app/logs/gc /app/logs/dump
    20→
    21→CMD ["java","-jar","/app/app.jar"]
    22→

1→{
     2→    "name": "website",
     3→    "version": "0.0.0",
     4→    "private": true,
     5→    "scripts": {
     6→        "docusaurus": "docusaurus",
     7→        "start": "TYPEDOC_WATCH=true docusaurus start",
     8→        "build": "TYPEDOC_WATCH=false docusaurus build",
     9→        "copyChangelog": "echo '---' > ./docs/CHANGELOG.md && echo 'id: changelog' >> ./docs/CHANGELOG.md && echo 'title: Changelog' >> ./docs/CHANGELOG.md && echo '---' >> ./docs/CHANGELOG.md",
    10→        "swizzle": "docusaurus swizzle --danger",
    11→        "deploy": "npm run build && scp -r build/* root@124.223.64.137:~/website",
    12→        "serve": "docusaurus serve",
    13→        "clear": "docusaurus clear"
    14→    },
    15→    "engines": {
    16→        "node": ">=14"
    17→    },
    18→    "dependencies": {
    19→        "@docusaurus/core": "2.0.0-beta.13",
    20→        "@docusaurus/plugin-google-gtag": "2.0.0-beta.13",
    21→        "@docusaurus/plugin-ideal-image": "2.0.0-beta.13",
    22→        "@docusaurus/plugin-sitemap": "2.0.0-beta.13",
    23→        "@docusaurus/preset-classic": "2.0.0-beta.13",
    24→        "aos": "^2.3.4",
    25→        "autoprefixer": "^10.4.0",
    26→        "clsx": "^1.1.1",
    27→        "docusaurus-plugin-typedoc": "^0.16.6",
    28→        "postprocessing": "^6.22.3",
    29→        "react": "^17.0.2",
    30→        "react-dom": "^17.0.2",
    31→        "react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.4.4",

content.content:
plugins {
    id 'java'
}

version 'unspecified'

repositories {
    mavenCentral()
}

dependencies {
    implementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-cache'
    implementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-aop'
    annotationProcessor "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-autoconfigure-processor"
    annotationProcessor "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-configuration-processor"
    implementation 'com.anji-plus:spring-boot-starter-captcha'

    implementation 'org.dhatim:fastexcel:0.12.13'
    implementation 'org.dhatim:fastexcel-reader:0.12.3'
    implementation 'io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-api:0.11.2'
    runtimeOnly 'io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-impl:0.11.2'
    implementation 'io.jsonwebtoken:jjwt-jackson:0.11.2'

    implementation 'com.google.zxing:javase:3.5.0'
    implementation 'net.coobird:thumbnailator:0.4.14'
    implementation 'com.github.ben-manes.caffeine:caffeine:2.9.2'
    implementation 'com.belerweb:pinyin4j:2.5.0'

    testImplementation 'org.springframework.boot:spring-boot-starter-test'
    testImplementation 'org.springframework.security:spring-security-test'
}

test {
    useJUnitPlatform()
}

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
    xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
    xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>
    <parent>
        <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
        <artifactId>survey-server</artifactId>
        <version>${revision}</version>
    </parent>
    <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
    <artifactId>ai</artifactId>
    <version>${revision}</version>
    <name>ai</name>
    <description>AI Module for SurveyKing</description>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- 依赖 shared 模块 -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>cn.surveyking</groupId>
            <artifactId>shared</artifactId>
            <version>${revision}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Spring WebFlux for reactive web client -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-webflux</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Jackson for JSON processing (already included in Spring Boot) -->

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <scope>provided</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test dependencies -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>

        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.projectreactor</groupId>
            <artifactId>reactor-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <skip>true</skip>

1→stages:
     2→  - check
     3→  - docker
     4→  - deploy
     5→
     6→# 检查连接
     7→check-testserver:
     8→  tags:
     9→    - "docker"
    10→  stage: check
    11→  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
    12→  interruptible: true
    13→  only:
    14→    - testserver
    15→  script:
    16→    - kubectl config view
    17→
    18→# 构建 容器
    19→docker-testserver:
    20→  tags:
    21→    - "docker"
    22→  stage: docker
    23→  image: docker:19.03
    24→  interruptible: true
    25→  only:
    26→    - testserver
    27→  script:
    28→    - docker build . -t 192.168.0.63:5000/px-collaspace-web-test:latest
    29→    - docker push 192.168.0.63:5000/px-collaspace-web-test:latest
    30→    - echo "镜像构建及推送完成"
    31→
    32→docker-master:
    33→  tags:
    34→    - docker
    35→  stage: docker
    36→  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/google/cloud-sdk:latest
    37→  interruptible: true
    38→  only:
    39→    - master
    40→  script:
    41→    - gcloud auth activate-service-account --key-file ${GOOGLE_ONLINE_CONTAINER_REGISTRY}
    42→    - gcloud auth configure-docker --quiet
    43→    - docker build . -t us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-collaspace-web:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    44→    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-collaspace-web:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
    45→    - docker tag us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-collaspace-web:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-collaspace-web:latest
    46→    - docker push us.gcr.io/mocan-cloud/px-collaspace-web:latest
    47→    - echo "px-collaspace-web:${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA} 推送成功"
    48→
    49→deploy-master:
    50→  tags:
    51→    - xshell
    52→  only:
    53→    refs:
    54→      - master
    55→  stage: deploy
    56→  variables:
    57→    CACHE_DIR: "shell-runner-cache/collabspace-deployment"
    58→    DIST_REPO: "https://oauth2:mTVn_6baAR8Koua-ZGcB@pt-gitlab.yottastudios.com/px/collabspace/deployment.git"
    59→  script:
    60→    - export CACHE_DIR=${HOME}/${CACHE_DIR}
    61→
    62→    - if ! [ -e $CACHE_DIR ]; then git clone -q $DIST_REPO $CACHE_DIR; fi
    63→    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    64→    - git fetch -q --prune --tags "origin"
    65→    - git checkout -B master remotes/origin/master
    66→
    67→    - cd $CACHE_DIR
    68→    - git config user.email "$GITLAB_USER_EMAIL"
    69→    - git config user.name "$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
    70→    - 'git commit --allow-empty -m "web: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE (SHA: $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA)"'
    71→    - git push -q "origin" master:master
    72→    - echo "部署留痕提交完成"
    73→  dependencies:
    74→    - docker-master
    75→
    76→# k8s 发布更新
    77→deploy-testserver:
    78→  tags:
    79→    - "docker"
    80→  stage: deploy
    81→  image: 192.168.0.63:5000/px-infra-kubectl:latest
    82→  interruptible: true
    83→  only:
    84→    refs:
    85→      - testserver
    86→  script:
    87→    - kubectl rollout restart deployment collabspace-web-deploy -n collabspace
    88→    - kubectl rollout restart deployment collabspace-web-deploy -n collabspace-private

content.text:
Now I have a comprehensive picture of the project. Let me compile the full report.

---

English translation of your request: "Explore the survey-king project thoroughly. I need to understand the project structure, server dependencies, frontend code, deploy config, environment variables, database type, runtime port, and Gradle module configuration."

---

Here is the complete exploration report for the survey-king project.

---

## Project Root Structure

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/`

```
CLAUDE.md  LICENSE  README.md  README.zh-CN.md
client/    deploy/  docs/      image/
scripts/   server/  website/
```

---

## 1. Server (`server/`)

### Module Layout (`settings.gradle`)

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/server/settings.gradle`

Gradle includes 5 modules:
- `api` — Spring Boot main app, REST controllers
- `shared` — core framework (security, cache, constants, DTOs, utils)
- `rdbms` — data access, MyBatis-Plus, Service impls
- `flow` — Flowable workflow engine (included in Gradle, commented out in Maven)
- `exam` — exam module (placeholder)

The `ai` module exists on disk (`server/ai/`) but is NOT included in `settings.gradle`. It IS included in `pom.xml` (Maven). To use it with Gradle you must manually add `include 'ai'`.

### Key Dependencies (across modules)

| Dependency | Version | Module |
|---|---|---|
| Spring Boot | 2.7.7 | all |
| Undertow (not Tomcat) | via Spring Boot | all |
| MyBatis-Plus | 3.5.0 | rdbms, flow |
| MySQL Connector | 8.0.26 | rdbms, flow |
| H2 (commented out) | 2.1.214 | rdbms |
| Flowable | 6.7.0 | flow |
| JWT (jjwt) | 0.11.2 | shared |
| Caffeine cache | 2.9.2 | shared |
| MapStruct | 1.4.2.Final | all |
| Lombok | 1.18.16 (Maven), 1.16.18 (pom) | all |
| fastexcel | 0.12.13 / 0.12.3 | shared, rdbms |
| anji-plus captcha | 1.3.0 | shared |
| ZXing | 3.5.0 | shared |
| Thumbnailator | 0.4.14 | shared |
| pinyin4j | 2.5.0 | shared |
| Spring WebFlux | via Spring Boot | ai |
| Spring Security | via Spring Boot | all |

No Redis dependency found anywhere — caching is done with Caffeine (local in-process) and captcha is configured with `cache-type: local`.

### Port Configuration

- **Dev**: port `7007` (`server/api/src/main/resources/application-dev.yml`)
- **Prod**: port `1991` (`server/api/src/main/resources/application-pro.yml`)
- **Docker (backend Dockerfile)**: exposes `8081`

### Database Configuration

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/server/rdbms/src/main/resources/config/application-dev.yml`

Default is **MySQL** in dev:
```
url: jdbc:mysql://localhost:3306/surveyking?rewriteBatchedStatements=true&...
username: root
password: 123456
driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver
```

H2 is commented out but supported (for fast local startup using `scripts/database/survey.mv.db`). Production config (`application-pro.yml`) also uses MySQL but leaves the connection URL unconfigured (to be injected at deploy time).

Logical delete field: `deleted` (MyBatis-Plus global config).

### `application.yml` Highlights

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/server/api/src/main/resources/application.yml`

- API prefix: `/api`
- Jackson: `non_null`, timezone `GMT+8`, date-format `yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss`
- URL token auth: enabled by default (`sk.security.url-token-authentication.enabled: true`)
- Flowable: disabled async executor and schema-update by default
- Captcha type: `blockPuzzle` (sliding puzzle), cache `local`
- AI (SiliconFlow): enabled, reads token from env var `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN`, default model `deepseek-chat`
- File upload limit: 2048MB

### AI Module Config

- Base URL: `https://api.siliconflow.cn`
- Token: env var `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` (falls back to `your_token` if not set)
- Models configured: DeepSeek Chat, Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct, Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct

### Controllers (`server/api/src/main/java/cn/surveyking/server/api/`)

```
AnswerApi.java   DashboardApi.java  ExerciseApi.java
FileApi.java     ProjectApi.java    RepoApi.java
ReportApi.java   SurveyApi.java     SystemApi.java
TemplateApi.java UserApi.java
```

### Build Notes

- Java target: 1.8 (JDK 8 required; Lombok 1.16/1.18 is incompatible with JDK 17+)
- Code format enforced by `io.spring.javaformat` plugin
- Gradle download mirror: Tencent Cloud
- Version: `v1.10.0` (Gradle) / `v1.9.0` (Maven)

---

## 2. Frontend (`client/`)

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/client/` contains only a `README.md` — no frontend source code is present. This is a placeholder directory.

However, compiled frontend assets ARE present and served by the Spring Boot backend via:

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/server/api/src/main/resources/static/`

This directory contains built JS/CSS chunks (e.g., `1004.40142565.chunk.css`, `1476.a945ca01.async.js`, etc.), indicating the frontend was built separately and embedded into the Spring Boot static resources.

---

## 3. Website (`website/`)

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/website/package.json`

This is a **Docusaurus 2.0** documentation site (not the application frontend):
- Framework: `@docusaurus/core` 2.0.0-beta.13
- React 17
- TailwindCSS, TypeDoc (API docs generation)
- Deploy target: `root@124.223.64.137:~/website` (via scp)
- Node requirement: `>=14`

---

## 4. Deploy (`deploy/`)

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/deploy/`

Contains 4 files:
- `Dockerfile.前端` — Node 24 Alpine builder, then Nginx 1.27-alpine runner; copies `deploy/project.conf` as nginx config (that file is NOT present in the repo yet)
- `Dockerfile.后端` — Amazon Corretto 21 builder, runs `./gradlew build -x test`, exposes port `8081`
- `.gitlab-ci.yml.前端` — GitLab CI for frontend: builds Docker image, pushes to internal registry or GCR, deploys to k8s (`collabspace-web-deploy`)
- `.gitlab-ci.yml.后端` — GitLab CI for backend: similar pipeline targeting `collabspace-server-deploy`

Note: The CI files are named with Chinese suffixes, not `.gitlab-ci.yml`, so they are not auto-triggered by GitLab as-is. They appear to be templates/references.

No `nginx.conf` or `project.conf` file is present in the repo.

---

## 5. Environment Variables / `.env`

No `.env`, `.env.example`, or similar file exists anywhere in the project. Configuration is done purely through Spring Boot YAML profiles. The only externalized secret is:

- `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` — set as an OS/container environment variable for the AI feature

---

## 6. Scripts (`scripts/`)

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/scripts/database/survey.mv.db` — H2 database file for quick local startup without MySQL.

`/d/project/pt-gitlab/survey-king/scripts/template/` — template files (contents not checked).

---

## Summary

| Item | Value |
|---|---|
| Framework | Spring Boot 2.7.7 |
| Web container | Undertow (not Tomcat) |
| Database (dev) | MySQL 8.0, `localhost:3306/surveyking`, root/123456 |
| Database (alt) | H2 (commented out, file: `survey.mv.db`) |
| Cache | Caffeine (local, no Redis) |
| Port (dev) | 7007 |
| Port (prod) | 1991 |
| Port (Docker) | 8081 |
| Java version | 1.8 (JDK 8 required) |
| Gradle modules | api, shared, rdbms, flow, exam (ai excluded from settings.gradle) |
| Maven modules | api, shared, rdbms, ai (flow commented out) |
| Frontend source | None in `client/` — built assets embedded in `server/api/src/main/resources/static/` |
| Docs site | Docusaurus in `website/` |
| AI integration | SiliconFlow API, token via `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` env var |
| No Redis, no .env file, no nginx conf in repo | |

---

**本次回答总结：**
对 survey-king 项目做了全面探索，覆盖以下内容：
1. 根目录结构：server/client/website/deploy/scripts/docs 各目录用途已明确
2. 服务端：Gradle 5模块（settings.gradle 未包含 ai，pom.xml 包含），主要依赖 MySQL + MyBatis-Plus，无 Redis，缓存用 Caffeine，开发端口 7007，生产端口 1991，Docker 暴露 8081
3. 前端：client/ 只是占位目录无源码，编译产物已内嵌到 server/api/src/main/resources/static/
4. website/ 是 Docusaurus 文档站，非应用前端
5. deploy/ 有前后端 Dockerfile 和 GitLab CI 模板（文件名带中文后缀，不会自动触发）
6. 无 .env 文件，唯一外部化密钥是 `AI_SILICONFLOW_TOKEN` 环境变量
